title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at FarmERP
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
